Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Industry Leading Noise Canceling Headphones with Auto Noise Canceling Optimizer, Crystal Clear Hands-Free Calling, and Alexa Voice Control, Black
4.6 out of 5 stars 28,547 ratings
$278.00 278. 00

Industry-leading noise cancellation powered by the integrated processor V1 and eight microphones. Crystal-clear hands-free calling with 4 beamforming microphones, advanced audio signal processing, and wind noise reduction. Magnificent sound quality with the newly developed 30mm driver unit.

  • Industry Leading Noise Cancellation - Two processors control 8 microphones for unprecedented noise cancellation
  • Magnificent Sound - Newly developed 30mm driver unit delivers crystal clear audio
  • Crystal Clear Hands-Free Calling - 4 beamforming microphones with AI-based noise reduction
  • Up to 30-hour battery life with quick charging (3 min charge for 3 hours of playback)
  • Ultra-comfortable and lightweight design for all-day wearing
  • Black
  • Blue
  • Silver
